caption: A woman with blonde highlighted hair and headphones is speaking into a professional microphone in a studio setting. She is wearing a black t-shirt that features a graphic logo. Behind her is a blue screen displaying the word "Johnson" in red letters, and to the right is a yellow vertical stripe next to a black wall. On-screen text includes the logos "BOSS TALK 101" and "PODCAST," along with "Employee Only" appearing in the upper right area of the blue screen. Throughout the sequence, the woman remains in a seated position, gesturing with her right hand near her face as she speaks. Her facial expression shifts slightly from a neutral speaking pose to a smile, while her hand moves from her shoulder area toward her jawline. The background and equipment remain stationary.
